summary: Iteration 3 frontend smoke + functional test on https://lucy-voice-vision.preview.emergentagent.com at 1920x1080. All 8 acceptance criteria from the review request pass: new 'What am I holding?' user bubble appears at index 3 (between 'Hello! How can I assist you today?' and 'Accessing your camera…'), ScrollProgress bar present (fixed, top:0, h:2px, z:70), SectionRail visible with all 5 rail-link-* anchors, rail-link-features click smooth-scrolls to scrollY=937 (>600), html scroll-behavior=smooth, parallax scroll 0→1500px throws no console errors, hero waitlist submission returns POSITION #0011 QUEUED FOR HANDSHAKE, no ' literal anywhere on page (incl. Calm emotion quote), FAQ accordion triggers work (6 detected, first expands on click). 0 console errors. 1 non-blocking framer-motion warning about scroll container position (pre-existing in ParallaxHero useScroll target).
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: Framer Motion logs a console warning 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position…' originating from ParallaxHero in Hero.jsx (lines 174-188). The motion.div wrapping ParallaxHero children has no explicit position; useScroll with target prefers a positioned ancestor. Cosmetic — does not affect functionality but adds noise to dev console. Consider adding className='relative' to the inner motion.div in ParallaxHero.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 waitlist entry via hero-waitlist (test_iter3_<ts>@neural.link, position #0011) — backend unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 100% green on frontend-only test. New chat bubble 'What am I holding?' at delay=2.0 is correctly placed between bubble #2 (Lucy 'Hello! How can I assist you today?') and bubble #4 (Lucy typing 'Accessing your camera…'). ScrollProgress (data-testid=scroll-progress-bar) is fixed top-0 h-2px z-70. SectionRail (data-testid=section-rail) only renders on xl breakpoint (>=1280px) — test viewport must be ≥1280 wide. Smooth scroll via rail-link-features works (scrollY jumps to ~937). All prior functionality (waitlist, emotion tabs, FAQ) intact. Single Framer Motion warning about scroll container position in ParallaxHero — non-blocking.
